text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, August 16. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Ethan did great with his school homework. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
